description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by dense greenery, with a driveway leading to a covered carport or garage. The structure features a complex, multi-gabled roof with several dormer windows and a prominent central entrance. The front facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a covered porch area. The property is bordered by tall hedges, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark gray roofing. The layout includes a paved walkway and driveway connecting the house to the adjacent street.
description: A single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled roof, symmetrical front, covered porch, and surrounded by dense hedges and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, covered porch, and driveway leading from the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport/garage, side windows, and the dense hedge boundary along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, roofline, and the continuous hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
